assessment.note: They described feeling disconnected and missing the last two socials, which points to lower wellbeing and engagement; the answer did not add clarity or growth signal.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What kind of support would make the next couple of weeks easier for you?
new_queue.description: Opens up practical support needs without presuming the problem is personal or performance-related.

new_queue.label: Review friction
new_queue.name: I wanted to ask about the design-system PR — what made that one hard to land?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the specific source of friction in the rework-heavy PR without assuming fault.

new_queue.label: Review turnaround
new_queue.name: What has been slowing your PR reviews down lately?
new_queue.description: Looks for concrete bottlenecks in the review loop and whether they are process, dependency, or confidence related.

new_queue.label: Ownership shift
new_queue.name: What parts of the frontend work still feel worth leaning into for you?
new_queue.description: Checks whether motivation and ownership are still present in specific areas of the role.

new_queue.label: Stretch gap
new_queue.name: Where do you feel like you're not getting enough stretch right now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces plateau, under-challenge, or a mismatch between current tasks and growth needs.

new_queue.label: Feedback texture
new_queue.name: How has the feedback on your recent work landed for you?
new_queue.description: Explores whether feedback is useful, discouraging, or unclear in practice.

new_queue.label: Next step focus
new_queue.name: What do you want to get back to feeling steady on first?
new_queue.description: Gets at the most immediate priority for recovery or re-engagement from their point of view.
